name: Tasty Lean Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease an 8 or 9-inch square baking pan with the oil spray.
3. In a medium bowl, sift together flour, cornmeal, sugar, and baking powder. Sift twice more.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and applesauce until well combined.
5. Pour the milk mixture into the dry ingredients and stir together until just combined. The batter does not have to be smooth; there should be a few lumps. Do not overmix, as this will make the cornbread tough and rubbery.
6. Pour the batter into the greased pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes until light golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Serve immediately.
Nutritional Analysis:
330 calories
2.3g of fat (6% of calories)
67.6g carbohydrates
54 mg cholesterol
232 mg sodium
